title: Glassbox updates: FairDARTS and structure-lock
summary:
Spent last week working on Glassbox. I added FairDARTS regularization to help the model pick binary gates. Now using Zero-One Loss and gate regularization to stop ambiguous structures. I also turned off LayerNorm by default because it was messing up the scale for symbolic regression.

Added structure-lock detection. If correlation hits 0.99, mutations stop. This happens around generation 5 or 7. I tested on y=x^2, sin(x), and x^3. Correlation is high, but coefficient accuracy is still not perfect. I tried intensive coefficient refinement after evolution, but it actually made results worse, so I disabled it. Also fixed a bug where dict.copy() was not cloning tensors correctly.
commitMessages: feat: Add FairDARTS regularization and structure-lock detection
